mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_rooms ( room_id, owner_id, partner_id, deleted_by_owner, deleted_by_partner ) VALUES ( #{roomId}, #{ownerId}, #{partnerId}, #{deletedByOwner}, #{deletedByPartner} )
mapper.select: SELECT cr.chat_room_id AS chatRoomId, cr.room_id AS roomId, r.room_title AS roomTitle, ( SELECT ri.image_url FROM room_image ri WHERE ri.room_id = cr.room_id AND ri.deleted = 0 ORDER BY ri.sort_order ASC, ri.image_id ASC LIMIT 1 ) AS roomThumbnailUrl, CASE WHEN cr.owner_id = #{memberId} THEN cr.partner_id ELSE cr.owner_id END AS otherMemberId, other_member.name AS otherName, other_member.photo_url AS otherPhotoUrl, CASE WHEN other_member.deleted = 1 OR other_member.status IN ('DELETED', 'BANNED') THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS otherDeleted, other_member.status AS otherStatus, last_message.message AS lastMessage, last_message.sent_at AS lastSentAt, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_messages unread_message WHERE unread_message.chat_room_id = cr.chat_room_id AND unread_message.sender_id != #{memberId} AND unread_message.message_id > COALESCE(crm.last_read_message_id, 0) AND ( crm.left_at IS NULL OR unread_message.sent_at > crm.left_at ) ) AS unreadCount FROM chat_room_members crm INNER JOIN chat_rooms cr ON crm.chat_room_id = cr.chat_room_id INNER JOIN rooms r ON cr.room_id = r.room_id INNER JOIN members other_member ON other_member.member_id = CASE WHEN cr.owner_id = #{memberId} THEN cr.partner_id ELSE cr.owner_id END INNER JOIN chat_room_members other_crm ON other_crm.chat_room_id = cr.chat_room_id AND other_crm.member_id = other_member.member_id LEFT JOIN chat_messages last_message ON last_message.message_id = ( SELECT visible_message.message_id FROM chat_messages visible_message WHERE visible_message.chat_room_id = cr.chat_room_id AND ( crm.left_at IS NULL OR visible_message.sent_at > crm.left_at ) ORDER BY visible_message.sent_at DESC, visible_message.message_id DESC LIMIT 1 ) WHERE crm.member_id = #{memberId} AND crm.is_hidden = 0 ORDER BY CASE WHEN last_message.sent_at IS NOT NULL THEN last_message.sent_at ELSE cr.created_at END DESC, cr.chat_room_id DESC

SELECT cr.chat_room_id AS chatRoomId, cr.room_id AS roomId, r.room_title AS roomTitle, ( SELECT ri.image_url FROM room_image ri WHERE ri.room_id = cr.room_id AND ri.deleted = 0 ORDER BY ri.sort_order ASC, ri.image_id ASC LIMIT 1 ) AS roomThumbnailUrl, CASE WHEN cr.owner_id = #{memberId} THEN cr.partner_id ELSE cr.owner_id END AS otherMemberId, other_member.name AS otherName, other_member.photo_url AS otherPhotoUrl, CASE WHEN other_member.deleted = 1 OR other_member.status IN ('DELETED', 'BANNED') THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS otherDeleted, other_member.status AS otherStatus, last_message.message AS lastMessage, last_message.sent_at AS lastSentAt, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_messages unread_message WHERE unread_message.chat_room_id = cr.chat_room_id AND unread_message.sender_id != #{memberId} AND unread_message.message_id > COALESCE(crm.last_read_message_id, 0) AND ( crm.left_at IS NULL OR unread_message.sent_at > crm.left_at ) ) AS unreadCount FROM chat_room_members crm INNER JOIN chat_rooms cr ON crm.chat_room_id = cr.chat_room_id INNER JOIN rooms r ON cr.room_id = r.room_id INNER JOIN members other_member ON other_member.member_id = CASE WHEN cr.owner_id = #{memberId} THEN cr.partner_id ELSE cr.owner_id END LEFT JOIN chat_messages last_message ON last_message.message_id = ( SELECT visible_message.message_id FROM chat_messages visible_message WHERE visible_message.chat_room_id = cr.chat_room_id AND ( crm.left_at IS NULL OR visible_message.sent_at > crm.left_at ) ORDER BY visible_message.sent_at DESC, visible_message.message_id DESC LIMIT 1 ) WHERE crm.chat_room_id = #{chatRoomId} AND crm.member_id = #{memberId} AND crm.is_hidden = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE chat_rooms SET deleted_by_owner = CASE WHEN owner_id = #{memberId} THEN 1 ELSE deleted_by_owner END, deleted_by_partner = CASE WHEN partner_id = #{memberId} THEN 1 ELSE deleted_by_partner END WHERE owner_id = #{memberId} OR partner_id = #{memberId}
